description:
\}A regular and common wooden sword.
Often found in tourist areas.
\V[207]\nCharge move = Rotating
Slash.
name: Wooden sword
note:
雑貨とかで一人配置
進行度によって購入できるものが増える

description:
\}Apparently it's a fake wooden sword.
What's the difference between it and
the real thing? \V[207]\nTame
technique = Rotating slash.
name: Wooden Sword - Fake

description:
\}A sword tool for practice swings. It
can also be used for muscle
training. \V[208]\nTame technique =
Front two-row slash.
name: Wooden Sword - Practice

description:
\}Anyway, it's a great wooden sword.
Experts should understand.
\V[207]\nTame technique = Rotating
slash.
name: Wooden Sword Ultimate

description:
\}A wooden sword made from white oak.
It's a small knife, so it's easy to
handle. \V[208]\nTame technique =
Front two-row slash.
name: Wooden Sword White Oak Short Sword

description:
\}A wooden sword within a wooden
sword. A splendid swing. \V[207]
Charged skill = Spin Slash.
name: Wooden Sword Master

description:
\}A wooden sword made from white oak.
It's a long sword, so it's difficult
to handle. \V[208]\nTame technique =
Front two-row slash.
name: Wooden Sword - Shirakashi Tachi

description:
\}A wooden sword with the same name as
a famous sword. The relationship is
unknown. \V[207]\nTame technique =
Rotating slash.
name: Wooden Sword - Kotetsu

description:
\}A wooden sword made from red oak.
It's a really good size.
\V[208]\nCharge move = Slash in
front of you.
name: Wooden Sword - Akagashi Chuto

description:
\}Same name as Murasame, but a wooden
sword. Was it a real wooden sword?
\V[207]\nTame technique = Rotating
slash.
name: Wooden Sword - Murasame

description:
\}Ebony wooden sword. A small and
nimble blade. \V[208]\nCharge move =
Frontal slashing in a row.
name: Wooden Sword Black Ebony Short Sword

description:
\}It's a wooden sword, but it's a
cursed blade. A very suspicious
item. \V[207] Charge move = Spinning
Slash.
name: Wooden Sword・Masamune

description:
\}The legendary sword of Japanese
mythology. It's just a name, of
course. \V[208]\nCharged attack =
Frontal multi-slash.
name: Wooden Sword Tenmurakumo Sword

description:
\}The same name as the legendary
sword. But a wooden sword is still a
wooden sword. \V[207] \n Special
move = Spinning Slash.
name: Wooden Sword Excalibur
